proposition: Able.cz s.r.o. is registered as the 100% shareholder of Blackfish & Co. s.r.o. (IČO 06526411) since 29 July 2025, with Václav Faraga added as a second jednatel on 28 July 2025 — confirming the media-reported acquisition at register level. Ownership before the deal: founder Vít Schlesinger held 100% at founding (2017, then named Black Fish Digital s.r.o.), one-third alongside Lukáš Caldr and David Veteška 2018–2020, 100% again 2020–2022, 70% during Lukáš Oslzla's 30% co-ownership 2022–2024, and 100% from 23 Feb 2024 until the sale.
shortTitle: Able.cz s.r.o. is registered as the 100% shareholder of Blackfish…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: Corrects the earlier mirror-based wording that Schlesinger held 100% continuously until the sale; the full ownership history is in the preserved VR record. Strengthens CLM-14.

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
